qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated server shutdown via POST /api/server/shutdown
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Finding identifies the exact advisory-described vulnerability: same endpoint (POST /api/server/shutdown), same root cause (unauthenticated syscall.Kill with SIGINT), same impact (server termination causing cyclic DoS with ~3-second restart intervals). The vulnerable code at controllers/server.go:44 directly calls syscall.Kill(syscall.Getpid(), syscall.SIGINT) without any authentication check, matching the advisory description.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The finding matches the advisory-described vulnerability exactly: the POST /api/server/shutdown endpoint lacks authentication and directly invokes syscall.Kill with SIGINT to terminate the Netmaker server, causing denial of service. The original poc_report.json confirms the vulnerability was successfully reproduced: unauthenticated POST request returned HTTP 200 with 'sending interruption' message, server process terminated, and health endpoint became unreachable. However, PoC re-execution failed due to network connectivity issues (unable to clone target repository from GitHub), so runtime predicates could not be satisfied during this judgement run.
evidence: vulnerability_report.json identifies the exact vulnerable endpoint (/api/server/shutdown) and root cause (syscall.Kill without authentication at controllers/server.go:44)
poc_report.json confirms successful reproduction: unauthenticated POST returns 200, server terminates, health endpoint unreachable
Advisory describes the same vulnerability: /api/server/shutdown endpoint allows unauthenticated termination via SIGINT, causing cyclic DoS
blockers_to_higher_tier: Network connectivity failure prevented PoC re-execution: unable to clone target repository from GitHub due to connection timeout
Cannot satisfy runtime predicates (exploit_success_predicate or bug_activation_predicate) without fresh PoC execution under judge artifact directory

poc_executions.observed_effect: Network connectivity failure during git clone prevented PoC execution. Original poc_report.json confirms successful verification: unauthenticated POST to /api/server/shutdown returns 200 with 'sending interruption' message, server process terminates, health endpoint becomes unreachable.
